scripts.dev: echo "Run app-level dev scripts with pnpm --filter"
scripts.db:generate: corepack pnpm exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:dev: corepack pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:validate: corepack pnpm exec prisma validate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
